response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly experienced full-stack engineer with 15+ years of relevant history, strongly aligned with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React). His current role at re:cinq directly involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, matching a key differentiator in the JD. He demonstrates deep testing culture through authored testing libraries, TDD workshops, and consistent application of TDD/CI/CD across roles. Database breadth (MongoDB, MySQL) and cloud/containerization experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) are solid. The main gaps are no explicit Nest.js experience and no mention of Kotlin, both of which are listed as required or secondary technologies.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience, well exceeding the 6-year minimum with demonstrated seniority across multiple high-scale environments
Active AI agent development at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure, directly matching a rare JD requirement
Exceptionally strong testing culture — authored open-source testing libraries, led TDD/Selenium workshops, and consistently applied TDD and trunk-based development across multiple roles
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js despite it being the primary backend framework in the required stack
Kotlin is absent from the resume even though it is listed as a secondary technology requirement
Python does not appear in the skills section despite being called out as a required language in the JD
